log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 55/67
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 43/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician --- HP: 43/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 30/67
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 10/67
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 1/67
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician --- HP: 1/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (1/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: -21/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 11] MAINTAINED!
